name: autorecipe
description: Local-first browser mining toolkit that turns user workflows into maps, request catalogs, and runnable recipes.

scripts.build: npm --workspace @autorecipe/knowledge-core run build && npm --workspace @autorecipe/capture-core run build && npm --workspace @autorecipe/browser-runtime run build && npm --workspace @autorecipe/runner-core run build && npm --workspace @autorecipe/desktop run build
scripts.typecheck: npm run build && npm --workspace @autorecipe/knowledge-core run typecheck && npm --workspace @autorecipe/capture-core run typecheck && npm --workspace @autorecipe/browser-runtime run typecheck && npm --workspace @autorecipe/runner-core run typecheck && npm --workspace @autorecipe/desktop run typecheck
scripts.test: npm --workspace @autorecipe/knowledge-core run test && npm --workspace @autorecipe/capture-core run test && npm --workspace @autorecipe/browser-runtime run test && npm --workspace @autorecipe/runner-core run test && npm --workspace @autorecipe/desktop run test
